chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.973 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application --------------------------------------------- 29.04.2025 Mr. Saeed Ahmed Magsi, advocate for applicant Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant, under instructions, does not press the instant criminal bail application, it is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
